titles.title: I Have a Very Big God

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have a very big God A very big God, oh He no dey fall my hand oh He's always on my side oh A very big God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: See my life Na so, so wonder If you know my God He's a miracle worker He dey come through on a regular Everything na Jaburata Him blessings no need formula This my God He's a very big God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Ah ah eeh, aah ah, ah eeh Ah ah eeh, aah ah, ah eeh Ah ah eeh, aah ah, ah eeh This my God He's a very Big God
